heroText: Curated botanical essentials for the modern living space. We believe that bringing nature indoors should be as simple and intentional as the plants themselves.

history.title: Monstera Deliciosa
history.description: Known as the Swiss Cheese plant, its dramatic natural perforations make it a living architectural statement for any minimalist interior.

history.title: Snake Plant
history.description: The sculptural sentinel. Its vertical, sword-like leaves provide a rigid geometric contrast to soft furniture and open living spaces.

history.title: Olive Tree
history.description: With its silver-green foliage and slender trunk, the Olive Tree brings a sense of Mediterranean tranquility and organic texture.
